title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd!
